metadata.name: Identify Suspicious Loitering Near Critical Infrastructure

description: Camera analytics detect a person loitering near a reservoir's perimeter fence for an extended period.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Perimeter Anomaly' alert from a camera at the 'City Reservoir'.
Review the live and archived video of the incident.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms a person is pacing back and forth along the fence line.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a police unit to perform a welfare check and investigate the suspicious activity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a patrol unit to the location.
